Excellent! Now let me create a comprehensive final report with all the data organized by category. Let me make one more search to get clean output:

Based on my comprehensive search of the decompiled source tree, here is a complete inventory of all unique strings matching the patterns "ai::value::", "ai::key::", "ai::processor::", and "ai::event::":

## AI METHOD/SUBCOMMAND STRINGS FOUND

### AI::VALUE:: (Method/Subcommand Names - 18 unique)
These are the method names that can be called with `common_call`:

1. **"ai::value::authorize"** - Account authorization
2. **"ai::value::check_privacy"** - Check privacy settings
3. **"ai::value::get_authorize_status"** - Get authorization status
4. **"ai::value::get_detect_data"** - Get detection data
